name: Atlassian Active Accounts Without Employee Record
description: Detects active Atlassian accounts whose email does not match any employee record.
query: SELECT u.account_id AS id, u.email_address AS email FROM atlassian_users u LEFT JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.email_address, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE COALESCE(u.active, true) = true AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email_address), '') != '' AND e.work_email IS NULL
remediation: Review unmatched accounts, classify approved non-employee identities, and disable unknown access.
